ONTARIO MADE · BRAMPTON, ON · SINCE 2004

Our Story.
Crafted in Ontario.

Two decades of Indiana Limestone fabrication and concrete precast — every piece made in Ontario, every specification met with precision.

VIEW OUR PRODUCTS REQUEST A QUOTE
"Crafted by Nature. Perfected by Design."

Tulip Limestone · Precast was built on one belief: that natural stone, properly crafted, outlasts everything else. Our Indiana Limestone comes from the same geological formation that supplied the stone for the Empire State Building, the National Cathedral, and the Biltmore Estate — one of the most trusted building materials in architectural history.

Based in Brampton, Ontario, we fabricate limestone and precast elements for homeowners, architects, and contractors across the Greater Toronto Area. Every piece is custom. Every specification is met with precision. And every project is approached as if it will stand for generations — because it will.

Why Tulip

Design-Led Stone Fabrication.

01

Expertise

Indiana Limestone and precast specialists with deep material knowledge accumulated over two decades. We understand how stone behaves across seasons and generations — and we design every piece with that permanence in mind.

02

Process

Custom shop drawings prepared by our drafting team, coordinated directly with your architect or contractor. Every specification confirmed before fabrication begins. No surprises on site.

03

Result

Standard profiles and fully custom solutions, trusted on luxury residences and commercial projects across the GTA. Work that stands long after the project closes — as it should.

We are proud to fabricate every product right here in Ontario. Choosing Tulip means investing in local craftsmanship, local employment, and a supply chain you can trust. Every piece ships from our Brampton facility — no overseas sourcing, no third-party fabrication.

Our Process

From First Contact to Delivery.

A clear six-step process that protects your timeline and ensures every specification is met before fabrication begins.

01

Contact

Email us at office@tulipprecast.com or call 647-534-7755 with your project details and requirements.

02

Estimate

Submit your project details to our estimating team. We'll prepare pricing based on your scope and specifications.

03

Shop Drawings

Our drafting team collaborates with your contractor or architect to address every specification. Full-size layouts reviewed as required.

04

Approval

Drawings are forwarded to the architect or responsible party for sign-off. Phone confirmation is required on return to proceed.

05

Fabrication

Upon receipt of a signed proposal and deposit, your project enters our fabrication schedule. Timeline confirmed at this stage.

06

Delivery

Your custom limestone or precast elements are delivered to site, ready for your contractor to install.

Specialty Orders

When ordering custom or replica pieces, please provide:

  • — Drawings and specifications for the piece
  • — Full-size layouts, if available
  • — For replicas: photographs and measurements of the existing piece
Start Your Order

Ready to work with us?

Send us your project details. Our team responds within one business day.
